inputs.text:
A realistic cinematic scene inside a small Italian beach bar in the 1980s. A boy and a girl stand next to a retro arcade cabinet. They stop playing, look at each other, smile naturally, take each other by the hand, then run together toward the beach and the sea outside the bar.
The movement is natural and believable. Their expressions are joyful and spontaneous. The camera gently follows them with a slight handheld tracking movement as they leave the arcade and run toward the bright beach. Warm summer sunlight, realistic human motion, nostalgic seaside atmosphere, shallow depth of field, professional short film look.

cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, distorted anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, deformed limbs, duplicated people, broken body motion, unnatural running, stiff movement, robotic movement, flickering, unstable motion, changing identity, face distortion, warped arcade cabinet, modern objects, smartphones, text, subtitles, watermark, logo, ghost, fast movements, surreal, flash, unnatural movements, distorted faces, disorted legs, change backgruound, wrong legs movements, ghost peoples, flash, color flashing

wan_video_generator.compatibility_note: This workflow targets a Wan2.2 video pipeline. Exact node compatibility depends on the Wan video node packages installed in your ComfyUI (e.g. WanVideo wrapper nodes). If a node class is missing, re-link the equivalent node from your installation. All generation settings are also available under extra.wan_video_generator.
